en.summary: FreeCli 0.0.3 strengthens workspace reliability with richer canvas tools, safer recovery behavior, and a more resilient release pipeline.

items.summary: Added richer workspace arrange controls, including Arrange By options, live magnetic snap guides, and standard-size tiled layouts.
Added image paste and drag-drop support on the canvas, plus in-app search, Control Center notifications, and Space Archives replay.
Refined workspace canvas interactions, shortcuts, context menus, and visual defaults for steadier editing and navigation flow.
Hardened the GitHub Actions release pipeline against future Node runtime migration and reduced artifact retention pressure.
Fixed persistence normalization, legacy workspace recovery, and agent session hydration so restored workspaces keep the correct bindings and node data.
Improved packaged terminal rendering, PTY isolation, theme syncing, and terminal input behavior to reduce startup and runtime failures.

zh-CN.summary: FreeCli 0.0.3 重点强化了工作区可靠性，补齐了更完整的画布能力、恢复链路修复，以及更稳健的发版流水线。

items.summary: 新增更完整的画布排布能力，包括 Arrange By 选项、实时磁吸参考线和标准尺寸平铺布局。
新增画布图片粘贴/拖放、应用内搜索、Control Center 通知以及 Space Archives 回放能力。
优化工作区画布交互、快捷键、上下文菜单和视觉默认值，让编辑与导航更稳定顺手。
加固 GitHub Actions 发版流水线，提前适配后续 Node 运行时迁移，并降低 artifact 存储压力。
修复持久化归一化、旧工作区恢复和 Agent 会话恢复链路，确保恢复后绑定关系和节点数据正确保留。
改进打包版终端渲染、PTY 隔离、主题同步和终端输入行为，减少启动与运行时异常。
